title: Vanilla+
description: A nice modpack that subtly enhances Minecraft, offering improvements and added features while preserving the game's original vibe.
body:
# There are two versions of the modpack! The no Physics Mod version, and the regular one!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/YJsU_o4sVdg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Vanilla+ Modpack:

Redefine Your Minecraft ExperienceDive into an elevated Minecraft journey with the Vanilla+ Modpack, tailored to enhance exploration, boost performance, and deepen the sensory experience. This modpack seamlessly integrates visual and auditory enhancements with realistic physics to offer a comprehensive, immersive gaming environment. Whether exploring solo or adventuring with friends, Vanilla+ provides the tools for a richer, more engaging Minecraft experience.

**Enhanced Exploration and Immersive Soundscapes:**

Experience the beauty of expanded landscapes with mods like Terralith, opening new realms for exploration. Complementing this, sound mods such as Sound Physics Remastered and Ambient Sounds add depth to the game's auditory landscape, enveloping you in a world where each environment sings with life.

**Realistic Physics for Deeper Engagement**

The Physics Mod adds a layer of realism to Minecraft, enriching your interaction with the game world through believable physical reactions. This mod ensures that your in-game actions feel impactful, enhancing the immersion and authenticity of your Minecraft adventures.

**Optimized Performance for Smooth Gameplay**

Vanilla+ is optimized to ensure smooth, responsive gameplay on systems with 2.5 to 3.5 GB of RAM recommended (4 if you whamt to play with shaders). This fine-tuning allows you to enjoy the modpack's enhancements without compromising on performance, making it accessible to a wide audience.

**Designed for Community and Connection**

Featuring mods that foster a sense of community, Vanilla+ is perfect for players who relish in exploring Minecraft's vastness together. Whether embarking on group projects or delving into solo quests, Vanilla+ enriches your shared experiences.

**Shader Compatibility for Visual Depth**

For those with higher-end systems, Vanilla+ supports shader packs to further enhance the game's visual appeal. Shaders add breathtaking lighting and effects, offering an optional yet rewarding layer of immersion for players seeking the ultimate visual experience.

**Join the Vanilla+ Adventure**

With Vanilla+ Modpack, embark on a Minecraft experience that's both familiar and freshly engaging. Keep an eye out for updates and new features, as we're committed to continually enriching your journey through Minecraft's endless possibilities.

_References:_

Vanilla Tweaks Resource Pack: [https://vanillatweaks.net/]
Physics Mod Pro: [https://www.patreon.com/Haubna]
Paragliders [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/paragliders]

Rediscover the joy of Minecraft with Vanilla+ Modpack, where innovation meets tradition in a beautifully enhanced world
